caption: The video shows a close-up view of a car's dashboard, specifically focusing on the digital display between the speedometer and tachometer. The display prominently features a message that reads "Press Brake and Push Button to Start," indicating that the car is not yet running and requires the driver to press the brake pedal and push the start button to ignite the engine. The odometer reading at the bottom of the display shows 20434 miles. The red brake warning light is illuminated, reinforcing the need to press the brake pedal. The camera remains steady, capturing the details of the dashboard and the instructions clearly, suggesting that the driver is preparing to start the vehicle.
